short_description: Number of foreground app events in a defined window
selection_reason: Selected for baseline phone/app engagement intensity
privacy_note: Uses aggregate counts only; no raw app content

short_description: Number of distinct foreground apps observed in a window
selection_reason: Selected for app-use breadth at T1 and change windows
privacy_note: Raw app names should not be exposed in clinical summaries

short_description: Entropy or diversity of foreground app use across observed apps
selection_reason: Selected to capture concentration versus diversity of app use
privacy_note: Use aggregate diversity only; avoid raw app lists

short_description: Count of battery rows at or below 20 percent battery level
selection_reason: Selected as a device availability and charging-context marker
privacy_note: Low privacy risk; context feature only; missing is not zero

short_description: Count of battery rows indicating charging or plugged state
selection_reason: Selected as a charging-context and routine marker
privacy_note: Low privacy risk; requires documented value-code rule; missing is not zero

short_description: Number of distinct Bluetooth addresses observed after deduplication
selection_reason: Selected to capture breadth of nearby Bluetooth device observations
privacy_note: Uses bt_address as an identifier for counting; report aggregate count only

short_description: Ratio of unique Bluetooth addresses to all deduplicated Bluetooth address observations
selection_reason: Selected to capture Bluetooth address diversity in the observed stream
privacy_note: Uses aggregate ratio only; missing is not zero

short_description: Number of call-log rows in the selected 24-hour window
selection_reason: Selected as major call-log activity volume feature
privacy_note: Aggregate count only; missing is not zero

short_description: Count rows with call_type code 1 incoming
selection_reason: Selected as major incoming call context feature
privacy_note: Aggregate count only; call-log table is privacy-sensitive

short_description: Count rows with call_type code 2 outgoing
selection_reason: Selected as major outgoing call context feature
privacy_note: Aggregate count only; outgoing calls are not necessarily completed conversations

short_description: Count rows with call_type codes 3 missed 5 rejected or 6 blocked
selection_reason: Selected as major unanswered/interrupted call context feature
privacy_note: Grouped feature requires cautious interpretation; missing is not zero

short_description: Sum of numeric call_duration values in seconds
selection_reason: Selected as major total call duration context feature
privacy_note: Duration does not prove meaningful conversation; aggregate only

short_description: Number of distinct cid values in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected as major cellular-context breadth feature
privacy_note: Raw cell IDs can imply location context; aggregate only

short_description: Number of distinct lac values in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected as major location-area breadth feature
privacy_note: Coarse context feature; missing is not zero movement

short_description: Count changes in consecutive cid values ordered by timestamp
selection_reason: Selected as major cellular-context transition feature
privacy_note: Sensitive to tower handoff repeated rows and reception conditions

short_description: Median milliseconds between consecutive deduplicated keyboard observations
selection_reason: Selected to capture keyboard text-state rhythm without saving raw text
privacy_note: Raw text is used transiently only; aggregate timing output only

short_description: IQR of milliseconds between consecutive deduplicated keyboard observations
selection_reason: Selected to capture variability of keyboard text-state rhythm
privacy_note: Raw text is used transiently only; duplicates and long idle gaps must be handled

short_description: Count gaps greater than 2 seconds between consecutive keyboard observations inside active typing
selection_reason: Selected to capture within-typing pause structure
privacy_note: Pauses are nonspecific and not diagnostic; aggregate only

short_description: Count typing bursts separated by gaps greater than 30 seconds
selection_reason: Selected to capture distinct keyboard activity episodes
privacy_note: Threshold-dependent exploratory feature; missing is not zero typing

short_description: Infer word boundaries from space transitions and compute median word completion time
selection_reason: Selected to approximate word production timing
privacy_note: Raw text-state parsed transiently only; no words saved

short_description: Count transitions where text length decreases
selection_reason: Selected to capture deletion/backspace-like correction behavior
privacy_note: Deletion is not direct error rate; aggregate only

short_description: Median numeric double_light_lux in the selected 24-hour window
selection_reason: Selected to capture typical ambient light context
privacy_note: Phone placement can dominate lux values; missing is not zero lux

short_description: Percent valid lux samples below 10 lux
selection_reason: Selected to capture approximate low-light context
privacy_note: Low lux can reflect pocket bag covered phone or nighttime; not sleep by itself

short_description: Mean lux during local nighttime hours 22:00-06:00
selection_reason: Selected to capture nighttime ambient light context
privacy_note: Requires sufficient nighttime samples and careful timezone handling

short_description: IQR of valid double_light_lux values in the selected 24-hour window
selection_reason: Selected to capture variability in observed ambient light context
privacy_note: Variability may reflect phone placement or logging artifacts

short_description: Count distinct timestamp/location observations in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected as the basic usable location-observation count
privacy_note: Aggregate count only; missing is not no movement

short_description: Sum haversine distance between consecutive distinct valid coordinates
selection_reason: Selected as an approximate phone movement distance feature
privacy_note: Raw coordinates should not be model-facing; GPS jitter and phone carrying behavior can inflate distance

short_description: Count distinct message observations after deduplication
selection_reason: Selected as the basic usable SMS/message-log activity count
privacy_note: Aggregate only; no raw message text phone numbers contacts or addresses

short_description: Count distinct observations where message_type is sent
selection_reason: Selected to capture outgoing message-log volume if type mapping is correct
privacy_note: Aggregate only; does not measure message content or social quality

short_description: Count changes between consecutive top activity labels ordered by timestamp
selection_reason: Selected to capture variability in phone-derived activity context
privacy_note: Transitions can reflect sampling artifacts label noise and phone carrying behavior

short_description: Fraction of top activity labels classified as still
selection_reason: Selected to capture relative still-labeled phone context within observed activity-recognition events
privacy_note: Still is not sleep inactivity or home presence; phone carrying behavior matters

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one activity-recognition event
selection_reason: Selected as feature 76 assumption to capture temporal spread of the activity-recognition stream
privacy_note: Data coverage support; missing is not no activity

short_description: Fraction of top activity labels classified as unknown
selection_reason: Selected to capture recognition uncertainty in the observed window
privacy_note: Unknown reflects sensor algorithm uncertainty not behavior

short_description: Diversity of top activity labels in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected to capture breadth of observed phone-derived activity states
privacy_note: Aggregate only; depends on recognition model and sampling

short_description: Count all screen rows in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected as basic screen-state event volume feature
privacy_note: Event count is not screen time and repeated transitions can inflate count

short_description: Count rows where screen_status equals 3
selection_reason: Selected as approximate unlock-event count
privacy_note: Unlocks are phone access opportunities not direct task engagement

short_description: Count rows where screen_status equals 1
selection_reason: Selected as approximate screen-on activation count
privacy_note: Screen-on events can occur without meaningful interaction

short_description: Count rows where screen_status equals 0
selection_reason: Selected as approximate screen-off transition count
privacy_note: Mostly useful together with on and unlock transitions

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one screen event
selection_reason: Selected to capture temporal spread of screen activity
privacy_note: Sparse logging can make this unstable; missing is not no use

short_description: Count screen events during local nighttime hours 22:00-06:00
selection_reason: Selected to capture nighttime phone screen-state context
privacy_note: Night screen activity is not sleep disturbance by itself

short_description: Count changes between consecutive screen_status values ordered by timestamp
selection_reason: Selected to capture screen-state switching intensity
privacy_note: Can reflect OS logging behavior as well as use behavior

short_description: Median paired unlocked-session duration
selection_reason: Selected to capture typical unlocked-session length
privacy_note: Sensitive to missing lock or off events and repeated status rows

short_description: Count all telephony rows in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected as basic telephony-state logging volume feature
privacy_note: Connectivity context only; not phone use by itself

short_description: Fraction of rows with data_enabled indicating enabled/on state
selection_reason: Selected to capture mobile-data availability/connectivity context
privacy_note: Coding of data_enabled must remain documented; not actual internet use

short_description: Diversity across observed network_type values
selection_reason: Selected to capture variation in cellular network mode
privacy_note: Depends on Android code mapping and device reporting; aggregate only

short_description: Number of distinct valid neighbor cid values in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected to capture neighboring cellular identifier breadth
privacy_note: Raw cell IDs can imply location context; aggregate only

short_description: Number of distinct valid neighbor lac values in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected to capture neighboring location-area breadth
privacy_note: Coarse cellular context only; missing is not no movement

short_description: Count changes between consecutive valid neighbor cid values ordered by timestamp
selection_reason: Selected to capture neighboring cellular-context transitions
privacy_note: Sensitive to duplicate logging tower handoff and reception conditions

short_description: Count distinct touch observations after deduplicating repeated timestamp app action and scroll rows
selection_reason: Selected to capture touchscreen interaction volume beyond screen state
privacy_note: Event count is not exact taps because logging duplicates and OS events may occur

short_description: Count distinct observations where touch_action is ACTION_AWARE_TOUCH_CLICKED
selection_reason: Selected to capture tap/click-like interaction events
privacy_note: Click labels are app accessibility events not exact finger taps

short_description: Count distinct observations where touch_action contains SCROLLED
selection_reason: Selected to capture scroll-like interaction events
privacy_note: Scroll events depend on app UI and logging behavior

short_description: Count changes between consecutive scroll directions up and down after deduplication
selection_reason: Selected to capture interaction variability during scrolling
privacy_note: Sensitive to duplicate handling and app layout

short_description: Count distinct touch_app values in the selected window
selection_reason: Selected to capture breadth of apps with touch interaction
privacy_note: Package names should remain aggregate and not be exposed as raw model features

short_description: Diversity of touch events across touch_app values
selection_reason: Selected to capture concentration versus breadth of touch interaction by app
privacy_note: Depends on package naming and system UI logging

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one distinct touch observation
selection_reason: Selected to capture temporal spread of touch interaction
privacy_note: Data coverage and use timing support only

short_description: Median absolute difference between scroll_to_index and scroll_from_index for valid scroll rows
selection_reason: Selected to capture approximate scroll movement size where indexes are meaningful
privacy_note: Index values are app dependent and may not represent physical distance

short_description: Count rows where is_moving indicates moving in the adjusted first-available 7-day window
selection_reason: Selected for significant-only adjusted delayed first-available analysis
privacy_note: Depends on AWARE significant-motion logic and phone carriage; not direct clinical activity

short_description: Fraction of valid significant rows where is_moving indicates moving
selection_reason: Selected for significant-only adjusted delayed first-available analysis
privacy_note: May be uninformative if all rows are moving by design; delayed window only

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one significant row
selection_reason: Selected for significant-only adjusted delayed first-available analysis
privacy_note: Data availability and timing support; missing is not no movement

short_description: Count changes in consecutive valid is_moving states ordered by timestamp
selection_reason: Selected for significant-only adjusted delayed first-available analysis
privacy_note: May be zero if table logs only significant moving events

short_description: Count sensor_linear_accelerometer rows in the adjusted first-available 7-day window
selection_reason: Selected as metadata logging volume for adjusted delayed analysis
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; not raw movement or acceleration

short_description: Count unique local hours with at least one sensor_linear_accelerometer metadata row
selection_reason: Selected as metadata temporal-spread support for adjusted delayed analysis
privacy_note: Data availability support only; missing is not no movement

short_description: Median observed double_sensor_resolution in adjusted first-available window
selection_reason: Selected as hardware resolution context
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; not movement behavior

short_description: Median observed double_sensor_maximum_range in adjusted first-available window
selection_reason: Selected as hardware range context
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; not movement behavior

short_description: Median observed double_sensor_power_ma in adjusted first-available window
selection_reason: Selected as hardware power/capability context
privacy_note: Hardware metadata only; not patient behavior

short_description: Max pressure minus min pressure from cleaned pressure in adjusted first-available 7-day window
selection_reason: Selected for adjusted barometer vertical-context signal analysis
privacy_note: Delayed adjusted window only; pressure affected by altitude weather hardware and sampling coverage

short_description: Standard deviation of cleaned pressure in adjusted first-available 7-day window
selection_reason: Selected for adjusted barometer pressure variability analysis
privacy_note: Delayed adjusted window only; not a direct behavioral or clinical measure

short_description: Count detected smoothed elevation transitions with absolute change at least 3 meters
selection_reason: Selected to capture meaningful vertical pressure shifts after smoothing
privacy_note: Exploratory signal-derived support feature; weather and phone carriage can confound interpretation

short_description: Sum absolute estimated elevation change across detected large transitions using 8.3 meters per hPa
selection_reason: Selected to capture cumulative vertical movement context
privacy_note: Approximate only and depends on smoothing thresholds and environmental pressure stability

short_description: Count detected transitions where pressure decreases enough to imply upward elevation change
selection_reason: Selected to capture likely upward vertical movement context
privacy_note: Exploratory support feature only; not posture and not diagnostic

short_description: Count detected transitions where pressure increases enough to imply downward elevation change
selection_reason: Selected to capture likely downward vertical movement context
privacy_note: Exploratory support feature only; not posture and not diagnostic
